images.caption: Figure 1:One-hop and multi-hop temporal routing within a single mixer layer.Transformer:influence fromτ\tautottfollows a single direct edge (one-hop).Mamba:influence fromτ\tautottfollows the chainτ→⋯→t\tau\to\cdots\to t(multi-hop along a single path).Sessa:influence fromτ\tautottaggregates over many paths with varying hop counts (multi-hop over many paths).
